calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust (Probate Code 17200), Will And Grant Deeds And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust (Probate Code 17200), Will And Grant Deeds And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar May-13-2008 Continued To Aug-12-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for and with Isabel Crowell. Caroline Hinshaw for Rita Garcia.

The parties requested the matter be referred to Pro Bono Mediation, which the Court granted (signing the order for the same in open court). Mediation is to be completed by August 05, 2008. The status conference is set for August 12, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Aguerre.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust (Probate Code 17200), Will And Grant Deeds And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Apr-15-2008 Continued To May-13-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Amanda Ebey for Isabel Crowell. Caroline Hinshaw for Rita Garcia.

Ms. Ebey requested a continuance stating that they were discussing settlement and that they needed time to finalize the terms. The matter was continued to May 13, 2008.

Judicial Officer: Judge John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: M. Loos.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust (Probate Code 17200), Will And Grant Deeds And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Mar-18-2008 Continued To Apr-15-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust (Probate Code 17200), Will And Grant Deeds And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Feb-05-2008 Continued To Mar-18-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust (Probate Code 17200), Will And Grant Deeds And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Dec-05-2007 Continued To Feb-05-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for Rita Garcia (Objector). Amanda Ebey for Isabel Crowell.

Ms. Hinshaw stated that the opposition had been filed and requested more time to do discovery. The matter was continued to february 5, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Julia Capozzoli.
